data.current_description: Redirects the user to the Swapkaart login page for OAuth authentication.
data.summary_suggestion: Redirect to Swapkaart OAuth login page
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth authentication flow by redirecting the user to the Swapkaart login page. Accepts OAuth parameters (client_id, redirect_uri, state, scope, response_type) as query parameters. Returns an HTTP redirect response (302/303) to the Swapkaart login endpoint. This is the first step in the OAuth authorization code flow.

data.current_summary: Authenticate user and exchange credentials for tokens
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user by exchanging credentials (email and password) for authentication tokens. Accepts an AuthRequest object containing user credentials. Returns authentication tokens including access token and refresh token. Validates credentials against the user database and establishes an authenticated session. Required for subsequent API calls using bearer token authentication.

data.current_summary: Exchange token for access and refresh tokens
data.description_suggestion: Exchanges a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens. Accepts an AccessTokenRequest object containing the refresh token. Returns an AccessTokenResponse with new access token, refresh token, and expiration information. Used to obtain a new access token when the current one expires without requiring the user to re-authenticate.
data.reasoning: Description is empty and summary is unclear about token types.
